option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent

originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">AI Study Assistance</string> <string name="default_web_client_id" translatable="false">YOUR_WEB_CLIENT_ID</string> <string name="title_home">Home</string> <string name="title_chat">Chat</string> <string name="title_upload">Upload</string> <string name="title_quiz">Quiz</string> <string name="title_profile">Profile</string> <string name="profile_default_name">Student</string> <string name="profile_default_initial">S</string> <string name="profile_label_email">Email</string> <string name="profile_label_phone">Phone Number</string> <string name="profile_not_available">Not available</string> <string name="profile_logout">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_title">Logout?</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_message">You will be signed out of your account.</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_action">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_cancel_action">Cancel</string>
<string name="common_back">Back</string> <string name="common_previous">Previous</string> <string name="common_next">Next</string>
<string name="flashcard_title">Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_title_with_topic">Flashcards: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_general_study">General Study</string> <string name="flashcard_my_notes">My Notes</string> <string name="flashcard_study_mode">Study Mode</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_quick_review">Quick Review</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_active_recall">Active Recall</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_initial">Card 1 / 10</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_format">Card %1$d / %2$d</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_initial">0s</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_format">%1$ds</string> <string name="flashcard_flip">Flip</string> <string name="flashcard_swipe_hint">Swipe left or right to navigate cards.</string> <string name="flashcard_deck_completed">Deck Completed!</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards_initial">Total Cards: 10</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_initial">Easy: 0 | Medium: 0 | Hard: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time_initial">Avg Time: 0 sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted_initial">Unattempted Cards: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards">Total Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_breakdown">Easy: %1$d | Medium: %2$d | Hard: %3$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time">Avg Time: %1$d sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted">Unattempted Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_review_hard_cards">Review Hard Cards</string> <string name="flashcard_review_unattempted">Review Unattempted</string> <string name="flashcard_restart_session">Restart Session</string> <string name="flashcard_finish_study">Finish Study</string> <string name="flashcard_question_label">Question</string> <string name="flashcard_tap_to_reveal">Tap to reveal answer</string> <string name="flashcard_think_prompt">Think before revealing the answer.</string> <string name="flashcard_show_answer">Show Answer</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_easy">Easy</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_medium">Medium</string> <string name="flashcard_difficulty_hard">Hard</string>
<string name="flashcard_setup_title">Setup Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_source">Flashcard Source</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_by_topic">By Topic</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_my_notes">My Notes</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_enter_topic">Enter Topic</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_placeholder">Selected Note: Physics.pdf</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_deck_size">Deck Size</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_number_of_cards">Number of Cards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_card_count_initial">10</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_card_count_format">Flashcards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generate_deck">Generate Deck</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generating">Generating Flashcards</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_select_note">Select Note</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_no_notes_uploaded">No notes uploaded</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_empty">Selected Note: -</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_selected_note_format">Selected Note: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_login_required">Please login to access notes</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_load_notes_failed">Failed to load notes: %1$s</string> <string name="flashcard_setup_generation_failed">Could not generate flashcards. Please try again.</string>
<string name="chat_actions_previous_available">%1$d previous chats available.</string> <string name="chat_actions_previous_empty">No previous chat sessions yet.</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_title">Delete chat session?</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_message">Are you sure you want to delete this session?\n\n%1$s</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_confirm">Delete</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="chat_delete_session_failed">Could not delete this session.</string> <string name="recent_activity_options">Recent activity options</string> <string name="chat_suggest_next_questions">Suggest next questions</string> <string name="chat_refresh_questions">Refresh questions</string> <string name="chat_suggesting_questions">Suggesting...</string> <string name="chat_no_suggestions_available">No suggestions available right now.</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">AI Study Assistance</string> <string name="default_web_client_id" translatable="false">YOUR_WEB_CLIENT_ID</string> <string name="title_home">Home</string> <string name="title_chat">Chat</string> <string name="title_upload">Upload</string> <string name="title_quiz">Quiz</string> <string name="title_profile">Profile</string> <string name="profile_default_name">Student</string> <string name="profile_default_initial">S</string> <string name="profile_label_email">Email</string> <string name="profile_label_phone">Phone Number</string> <string name="profile_not_available">Not available</string> <string name="profile_logout">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_title">Logout?</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_message">You will be signed out of your account.</string> <string name="profile_logout_confirm_action">Logout</string> <string name="profile_logout_cancel_action">Cancel</string>

name="flashcard_my_notes">My Notes</string> <string name="flashcard_study_mode">Study Mode</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_quick_review">Quick Review</string> <string name="flashcard_mode_active_recall">Active Recall</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_initial">Card 1 / 10</string> <string name="flashcard_progress_format">Card %1$d / %2$d</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_initial">0s</string> <string name="flashcard_timer_format">%1$ds</string> <string name="flashcard_flip">Flip</string> <string name="flashcard_swipe_hint">Swipe left or right to navigate cards.</string> <string name="flashcard_deck_completed">Deck Completed!</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards_initial">Total Cards: 10</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_initial">Easy: 0 | Medium: 0 | Hard: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time_initial">Avg Time: 0 sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted_initial">Unattempted Cards: 0</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_total_cards">Total Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_difficulty_breakdown">Easy: %1$d | Medium: %2$d | Hard: %3$d</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_avg_time">Avg Time: %1$d sec</string> <string name="flashcard_completed_unattempted">Unattempted Cards: %1$d</string> <string name="flashcard_review_hard_cards">Review Hard Cards</string> <string name="flashcard_review_unattempted">Review Unattempted</string> <string name="flashcard_restart_session">Restart Session</string> <string name="flashcard_finish_study">Finish Study</string> <string name="flashcard_question_label">Question</string> <string name="flashcard_tap_to_reveal">Tap to reveal answer</string> <string name="flashcard_think_prompt">Think before revealing the answer.</string> name="flashcard_difficulty_hard">Hard</string>

Please try again.</string>

<string name="common_sending">Sending…</string>
<string name="signin_signing_in">Signing In…</string> <string name="signin_send_reset_link">Send Reset Link</string> <string name="signin_please_wait">Please wait…</string> <string name="signin_sign_in">Sign In</string>
<string name="signup_creating_account">Creating Account…</string> <string name="signup_send_verification_email">Send Verification Email</string> <string name="signup_checking">Checking…</string> <string name="signup_check_verified">Check Verified</string> <string name="signup_resending">Resending…</string> <string name="signup_resend_otp">Resend OTP</string> <string name="signup_otp_resent">OTP resent</string> <string name="signup_send_otp_first">Send OTP first</string> <string name="signup_verifying">Verifying…</string> <string name="signup_verify_phone_otp">Verify Phone OTP</string> <string name="signup_create_account">Create Account</string> <string name="signup_send_phone_otp">Send Phone OTP</string> <string name="signup_phone_otp_sent_status">OTP sent. Enter code to verify phone.</string> <string name="signup_phone_verified">Phone verified</string> <string name="signup_phone_not_verified">Phone not verified</string> <string name="signup_phone_verification_failed">Phone verification failed</string> <string name="signup_email_not_verified">Email not verified</string> <string name="signup_phone_otp_blocked_countdown">Phone OTP temporarily blocked. Try again in %1$02d:%2$02d</string>
<string name="home_progress_day_streak"> %1$d</string> <string name="home_progress_quizzes"> %1$d</string> <string name="home_progress_topics"> %1$d</string> <string name="home_resume_flashcards">Resume Flashcards</string> <string name="home_continue_flashcards_subtitle">Flashcards: %1$s (Card %2$d/%3$d)</string> <string name="home_resume_quiz">Resume Quiz</string> <string name="home_continue_quiz_subtitle">Quiz: %1$s (Q%2$d/%3$d)</string> <string name="home_general_quiz">General Quiz</string> <string name="home_general_study">General Study</string> <string name="home_general_chat">General Chat</string> <string name="home_study_file">Study File</string> <string name="home_recent_quiz_title">Quiz - %1$s</string> <string name="home_recent_flashcards_title">Flashcards - %1$s</string> <string name="home_recent_chat_title">AI Chat - %1$s</string> <string name="home_recent_upload_title">Upload - %1$s</string> <string name="home_remove_recent_title">Remove from Recent Activity</string> <string name="home_remove_recent_message">Remove "%1$s" from Recent Activity?</string> <string name="home_remove">Remove</string> <string name="home_remove_recent_failed">Could not remove this activity</string> <string name="home_recent_subtitle_format">%1$s • %2$s</string> <string name="home_welcome">Hello, %1$s </string> <string name="home_clear_recent_title">Clear recent activity</string> <string name="home_clear_recent_message">Remove all items from Recent Activity?</string> <string name="home_clear">Clear</string> <string name="home_no_flashcard_session">No flashcard session to resume</string> <string name="home_no_quiz_session">No quiz session to resume</string> <string name="home_continue_learning_title">Continue Learning</string> <string name="home_continue_learning_message">Resume where you left?</string> <string name="home_resume">Resume</string> <string name="home_start_over">Start Over</string> <string name="home_streak_value"> %1$d days</string> <string name="home_streak_hint_today">Great work today. Keep it going tomorrow!</string> <string name="home_streak_hint_keep">Study today to keep streak</string> <string name="home_last_active_never">Last active: Never</string> <string name="home_last_active_today">Last active: Today</string> <string name="home_last_active_yesterday">Last active: Yesterday</string> <string name="home_last_active_days_ago">Last active: %1$d days ago</string> </resources>
